message.content:
@startuml
title band301
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #333333
  LifeLineBorderColor #999999
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #999999
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #EEEEEE
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
  NoteBorderColor #999999
}

participant BTManager
participant BTCallback
participant BleController
participant ScannerPresenter
participant LeScannerV21
participant WristbandManager
participant L2Layer
participant L2KeyPacket
participant L2CMDPacket
participant L1Layer
participant L1Packet
participant GattLayer
participant BluetoothGatt

== 初始化 ==
BTManager -> WristbandManager : onCreate
activate WristbandManager
WristbandManager -> L2Layer : new
activate L2Layer
L2Layer -> L1Layer : new
activate L1Layer
L1Layer -> L1Packet : new
activate L1Packet
L1Layer -> GattLayer : new
activate GattLayer

BTCallback -> BleController : initial
activate BleController
BleController -> ScannerPresenter : new
activate ScannerPresenter
ScannerPresenter -> LeScannerV21 : new
activate LeScannerV21

== 搜索设备 ==
BTCallback -> BleController : forceLeScan
BleController -> ScannerPresenter : scanLe
ScannerPresenter -> LeScannerV21 : scanLeDevice
LeScannerV21 -> LeScannerV21 : startScan
LeScannerV21 --> ScannerPresenter : onScanResult
ScannerPresenter -> ScannerPresenter : notifyLeScan
ScannerPresenter --> BleController : onLeScan
BleController -> BleController : onNewDevice
BleController -> BleController : mHandler.handleMessage
note left of BleController
搜索蓝牙设备
end note
note left of BleController : MSG_FIND_BONDED_DEVICE

== 建立GATT连接 ==
BTCallback -> WristbandManager : Connect：找到合适的设备地址，使用该地址进行蓝牙连接
WristbandManager -> L2Layer : connect
L2Layer -> L1Layer : connect
note over L1Layer,L1Packet
开启两个线程：Tx发送，Rx接收
end note
L1Layer -> L1Layer : startTxSchedule
L1Layer -> L1Layer : startRxSchedule
L1Layer -> GattLayer : connect
GattLayer -> BluetoothGatt : connect
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGatt : onConnectionStateChange
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGatt : requestMtu
note right of BluetoothGatt : 设置MTU：240
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGatt : onMtuChanged
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGatt : discoverServices
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGatt : onServicesDiscovered
note right of BluetoothGatt
通过UUID，发现我们设置的Service和数据特征Characteristic
end note
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGatt : onDescriptorWrite
BluetoothGatt --> GattLayer : mGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange
GattLayer --> L1Layer : mGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange
L1Layer --> L2Layer : mTransportCallback.onConnectionStateChange
L2Layer --> WristbandManager : mApplicationCallback.onConnectionStateChange
WristbandManager -> WristbandManager : RequestLogin
WristbandManager -> WristbandManager : RequestSetNeedInfo
WristbandManager -> WristbandManager : SetUserProfile
BleController -> BleController : mHandler.handleMessage
note left of BleController : MSG_STATE_CONNECTED
BleController -> WristbandManager : StartLoginProcess

== 封装并发送数据包-Tx ==
WristbandManager -> L2Layer : SettingCmdUserSetting
L2Layer -> L2KeyPacket : preparePacket：key(1B):dataLen(2B):data
activate L2KeyPacket
L2Layer -> L2CMDPacket : preparePacket：cmd(1B):version(1B)
activate L2CMDPacket
L2Layer -> L1Layer : sendData
L1Layer -> L1Packet : prepareDataPacket
activate L1Packet
L1Packet -> L1Packet : preparePacket
note right of L1Packet
magic:AB; er-ack-version:00; len(2B);crc(2B);seq(2B)
end note
L1Layer -> L1Layer : addToTxPacketList
L1Layer -> L1Layer : ThreadTx.run
note right of L1Layer
每隔1秒第一次发送所有数据，新数据追加，重试3次
end note
L1Layer -> L1Layer : getFromTxPacketList
L1Layer -> L1Layer : unpackSendPacket
L1Layer -> GattLayer : sendGattLayerData
GattLayer -> BluetoothGatt : sendData
L1Layer -> L1Layer : tellUpstackPacketSend
note right of L1Layer : 发送成功，Sequenced++
L1Layer --> L2Layer : onDataSend

== 接收数据-Rx ==
BluetoothGatt -> BluetoothGatt : onCharacteristicChanged
BluetoothGatt --> GattLayer : mGattCallback.onDataReceive
GattLayer --> L1Layer : receiveData
L1Layer -> L1Layer : decodeReceiveData
L1Layer -> L1Layer : parseHeader
note right of L1Layer
parseHeader解析出magic、ack、长度len、crc、sequenced
end note
L1Layer -> L1Layer : parseData
note right of L1Layer
如果接收的数据长度等于1，且中间没有接收到数据则返回：LT_FULL_PACKET
否则：数据缓存到队列（Rx队列），直到LT_SUCCESS，等待数据解析完成
end note
L1Layer -> L1Layer : sendAckPacket
L1Layer -> L1Layer : addToRxPacketList
L1Layer -> L1Layer : ThreadRx.run
note right of L1Layer : 每隔1秒第一次发送所有数据，新数据追加
L1Layer -> L1Layer : getFromRxPacketList
L1Layer --> L2Layer : onDataReceive
L2Layer -> L2Layer : parseData：解包2：cmd(1B):version(1B)
L2Layer -> L2Layer : parseData：解包3：key(1B):len(2B):data

== handshake ==
BTCallback -> WristbandManager : handshake
WristbandManager -> L2Layer : handshake
L2Layer -> L1Layer : handshake
L1Layer -> GattLayer : sendData
GattLayer --> L1Layer : onDataReceive
L1Layer --> L2Layer : onDataReceive
L2Layer --> WristbandManager : onHandshakeCallback
WristbandManager --> BTCallback : onHandshakeCallback

deactivate L1Packet
deactivate L2CMDPacket
deactivate L2KeyPacket
@enduml
